name: corcept_hook_before_subprocess_spawn
title: Corcept Hook: BeforeSubprocessSpawn
description: ADR-0006 BeforeSubprocessSpawn hook — fires before a tool implementation invokes Command::new / execve. Authority: Observe. Trust ceiling: Reviewed. Hook input JSON: BeforeSubprocessSpawnInput (program, argv, env, cwd). cellos enforcement layers on top.
